results.title: SolonGate: Security Gateway for AI Agents - Product Hunt
results.content: # SolonGate. ## Security Gateway for AI Agents. ## Similar Products. ### Engineering & Development. ### LLMs. ### Productivity. ### Marketing & Sales. ### Design & Creative. ### Social & Community. ### Finance. ### AI Agents. ### Trending categories. ### Top reviewed. ### Trending products. ### Top forum threads. ## Previous SolonGate Launches. Launched on March 12th, 2026. The move from prompt filtering to action governance is the right edge to own for agentic support and ops workflows. I'd use this in front of an agent that can touch tickets, refunds, or internal APIs, where a blocked action needs to be explainable to the team. When SolonGate denies an API call, does it return a policy-level reason that can be logged back into the agent trace?
